task_completion.description: Open the broker statement CSV file to identify the missing transaction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application or text editor is open, displaying the contents of 'jan_2024_statement.csv'.

task_completion.description: Open the JStock application and navigate to the 'My Portfolio' tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is visible and the 'My Portfolio' tab is selected, showing existing transactions.

task_completion.description: Initiate a new 'Buy' transaction in JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Buy' transaction dialog or entry form is open within the JStock application.

task_completion.description: Enter the exact details of the missing GOOGL transaction into JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The transaction entry form in JStock is filled with the stock symbol 'GOOGL', 20.0 units, a price of 148.50, and the date 'Jan 22, 2024' (or equivalent date format).

task_completion.description: Verify that the GOOGL transaction has been successfully added to the portfolio alongside existing stocks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main 'My Portfolio' view in JStock displays the newly added GOOGL transaction with the correct details, and the existing AAPL and MSFT transactions are still present.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the JStock graphical user interface to add the transaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the JStock application windows and dialogs, rather than editing the underlying portfolio CSV file directly in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the existing transactions were not modified or deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The AAPL and MSFT transactions remain visible and unchanged in the JStock portfolio view throughout the process.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually opened and read the broker statement.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is at least one screenshot showing the 'jan_2024_statement.csv' file open and its contents visible, proving the agent didn't hallucinate the transaction details.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The missing transaction to add is for the stock GOOGL, with 20.0 units, a purchase price of 148.50, and a date of Jan 22, 2024. The existing stocks in the portfolio are AAPL and MSFT, which must remain unchanged.
